app-description: Te « Meeting Media Manager », o te hō’ē ia rorohiko tū’ati-rau nō te fa’ahōho’a i te mau roromira i te mau rurura’a a te amuira’a a te Ite nō Iehova.

automatic-sync-disabled-explain: E tūpatihia noa te tū’atira’a nō teie tōfati e tae noa atu e fa’ata’ahia ai te reo ’āu’ī i roto i te mau fa’anahora’a.
automatic-sync-enabled: ’Ua fa’atū’atihia te tū’atira’a ’a’ano noa o te mahana e te hora o te putuputura’a

autoStartAtLogin: E ha’amā’iti ’a’ano noa ia M³ ’ia tūmā te rorouira
autoStartAtLogin-explain: E nehenehe tā M³ e ha’amata-noa-ra’a ’ia tū’ama-hia te application.
autoStartMusic: E ha’amata-noa i te pehe roromira hou te putuputura'a
autoStartMusic-explain: E ha’amata-noa te pehe roromira ’ia fati te parau ē e ha’amata te putuputura'a i roto i te tahi mau minuti ’aore rā hora i muri i te ha’atama-ra’a ia M³.
baseUrl-explain: ’A pāpa’i i te vāhi noho nō te tahua natirara a te 'Ite o Iehova.
beginPlaybackPaused: Ha’atere i te parau mātā’ia ma te fa’ataupū
beginPlaybackPaused-explain: ’Ia fa’aterehia teie rāve’a, e ha’amata te parau mātā’ia fa’aro’o ’e te roro uira ma te fa’ataupū, nō te tauturu ia ’oe ’ia fa’aineine i te tahi atu mau ’ohipa (mai te hāpa’ira’a o Zoom) hou a ha’atere ai.
beta-tooltip: Tei roto teie rāve’a i te tahi mau tāmā’atara’a (beta), ’e e nehenehe e tupu te hapa. ’A ara maita’i ’ia fa’a’ohipa ’oe i teie rāve’a i te taime putuputura'a, ’e ’a fa’a’ite mai i te mau fifi ta ’oe e firi mai.
beta-version-warning: He neneva teie (beta), ’e ’eiaha e fa’a’ohipahia i te Piha a te Basileia ’aore rā nō te mau putuputura'a mātā’ia maita’i.
cacheFolder: Vāhi noho o te putu’era’a tāmau
cacheFolder-explain: ’A mā’iti i te hō’ē fā’ari parau nō te ha’apahu i te mau parau tāmau, mai te mau pātara’a parau ’e te mau parau mātā’ia. ’Ia vaoho-noa-hia te reira ma te pāpa’i-’ore-hia, e fa’anaho noa te application i teie tuha’a nā ’oe.
cacheFolder-wizard: Tautau ’outou? ’A ha’atī’ahia teie tuha’a. E mā’iti mātou i te hō’ē vāhi mātauhia e tano nō te nu’ura’a o te ta’ata.
camera-access-required: ’Aita e fā’arihia ra te tura’i tātā’ira’a ’aore rā tē ma’iri ra te mau fa’ati’ara’a
camera-access-required-explain: ’A tāmata i te hō’ē tura’i ’ē, ’aore rā ’a fa’atere fa’ahou i te porotarama ’ia oti te mau fa’ati’ara’a tura’i i te hōro’ahia i roto i te mau Fa’anahora’a Application.
camera-as-background: Te tura’i nō te hi’ora’a tuati
change-tag-explain: ’A taui i te huru ’e te i’oa o te tāpa’o nō teie parau mātā’ia.
choose-a-document-for-import: ’A mā’iti i te hō’ē tumu parau, penina, ’aore rā upo’o parau:
choose-a-folder: ’A mā’iti i te hō’ē fā’ari parau
circuit-overseer: Ti’aau nō te tahi mau amuira’a
clear-cache: E tāmā i te pūputu’ite tāpuni
clicking-it-will-allow-you-to-start-and-: ’Ia nī’iti-’ia, e ti’a ia ’oe ia ha’amata e ia tāpū i te pehe roromira. E fa’ahoro ’a’ano noa te pehe hou te hora putuputura’a ’ia ha’amā’itihia ia M³, e e tāpū ’a’ano noa ato’a i mua i te ha’amatara’a o te putuputura’a. Noa atu rā, e ti’a ia fa’ahoro-rima-hia te pehe roromira i muri iho i te pure fa’atopara’a, mā te fa’a’ohipa i teie pata.
clicking-it-will-allow-you-to-temporaril: ’Ia nī’iti-’ia, e nehenehe ’oe e huna taime noa i te roromira e te ’īrava nō te matahiti, nō te fa’a’ite i te mau ta’ata i ni’a ia Zoom i muri mai. ’Ia oti te tuha’a a Zoom, e nehenehe ’oe e fa’a’ite fa’ahou i te ’īrava nō te matahiti mā te fa’a’ohipa i taua pata ra.
clicking-the-close-button-again-will-clo: ’Ia nī’iti-fa’ahou-hia taua pata ra, e fātau ia M³.
co-final-talk: Orara’a parau hope’a a te tahi rurura’a ha’a’atira’a
co-service-talk: Orara’a parau nō te tāvinira’a a te tahi rurura’a ha’a’atira’a
configure-a-scene-in-obs-studio-to-captu: E fa’ahu’ahu’a i te hō’ē fa’a’itera’a i roto ia OBS Studio nō te haru i te ha’amāramarama roromira.
configure-a-scene-in-obs-studio-to-show-: E fa’ahu’ahu’a i te hō’ē fa’a’itera’a i roto ia OBS Studio nō te fa’a’ite i te tahua ’ā’ano.
configure-the-websocket-plugin-in-obs-st: E ti’a ia ’oe ia fa’ahu’ahu’a i te tīpahu @:obsWebSocket i roto ia OBS Studio. E tītau-ato’a-hia te tīpahu nō te ’Acha’amata roromira Virtual Camera, nō reira, ’ia pāpū ē ’ua tū’atihia e ’ua fa’anaho-ato’a-hia te reira.
congregation-lookup-explain: Teie te huru, ’a pāpa’i i te tahi mau ta’o fā’ito mai te i’oa o tā ’outou amuira’a ’e te oire a henua rā e vai ai te reira. E fāna’o-hia teie mau parau nō te tātara-noa-ra’a mai i te porotarama o te mau rurura’a ’e te reo.
congregationMeetings: Te mau putuputura'a a te amuira’a
congregationMeetingsDescription: Te mau fa’anahora’a nō tā ’outou amuira’a ’e te porotarama o te mau putuputura'a
congregationName-explain: E fa’a’itehia teie i’oa i roto i te tātara’a mā’itira’a fāito o te application iti.
convertFilesToMp4: E fa’ariro i te mau pu’e parau fa’arereihia ’ei MP4
convertFilesToMp4-explain: ’Ia fa’atupuhia te reira, e fa’arirohia te mau pu’e parau ’ere-pāpa’ira’a-ata ’ei huru MP4 hou ’a fa’arerei ai. Māoti te reira e tū’ati ai te reira i te rorohiko o Zoom nō te ’ōpere-noa-ra’a i te MP4, e fāna’ohia ai te hō’ē fa’ata’ira’a parau mātā’ia māmā a’e ’e te maita’i roa atu i te ’ōperera’a ha’amāramarama.
coWeek: Te fāreira’a i muri nei a te hi’opo’a ha’a’ati
coWeek-explain: ’Ia pāpa’ihia te reira, e rāve’a tā M³ nō te fa’anu’u-noa-ra’a i te putuputura'a o te rotopū hebedoma i te mahana piti o taua hebedoma ra. E ha’apa’e-ato’a-hia te mau parau mātā’ia o te Ha’api’ira’a Bibilia a te amuira’a, ’e e ha’apa’ehia te mau hīmene fa’ari’ira’a nō te rurura’a o te rotopū hebedoma ’e tō te hope’a hebedoma.
currently-loading: Te fā’fa’ata’a-fa’ahou-hia nei te mau parau mātā’ia nō teie mahana.
custom-background-removed: Ua huri-fa’ahou-hia te tua hōho’a mā’iti i te huru mātāmua.
custom-background-set: Ua fa’’ari-hia te hōho’a i mā’itihia ’ei mono nō te ’īrava nō te matahiti.
custom-background-will-not-persist: A hi’o mai na : e ’ore e tāpurahia te tua hōho’a mā’iti ’ia fa’aru’e ’oe i te application.

customEventMediaPlayShortcut: Rāve’a pōpō nō te ha’utira’a media
customEventMediaPlayShortcut-explain: Te rāve’a pōpō o te pitopito parau e hā’onohia ’ia ha’amata te media i te ha’uti.
customEventMediaStopShortcut: Rāve’a pōpō nō te fa’a’orati’a media
customEventMediaStopShortcut-explain: Te rāve’a pōpō o te pitopito parau e hā’onohia ’ia fa’a’ora-roa-hia te media.
darkMode-explain: E fa’atura i te fa’anahora’a ’ia fa’a’ohipa i te huru hōho’a māramarama ’aore rā pō’iri, ’aore rā e pe’e i te rāve’a tōmura’a a te pūnaho

days-long: Tāpati_Monire_Mahana piti_Mahana toru_Mahana maha_Mahana pae_Māhana mā’a
delete-all-additional-media: E tū’ino i te mau pōha’a ato’a i fa’a’ō-rima-hia mai
delete-media: E tū’ino i te pōha’a media
delete-media-explain: E mā’iti i teie rāve’a nō te tū’ino i te pōha’a media i mā’itihia.
delete-selected-media: E tū’ino i te mau pōha’a media i mā’itihia
delete-selected-media-confirmation: Te pāpū maita’i ra ānei ’oe ē e tū’ino i teie mau pōha’a media e {count} i mā’itihia? ’Eita teie ’ohipa e nehenehe e fa’ahoi mai.
delete-selected-media-explain: E tū’ino-roa-hia teie mau pōha’a media i mā’itihia mai ni’a mai i tō ’oe rorouira ’ia fā’o-rima-hia te reira. ’Eita rā te mau media i tōtautā-noa-hia mai e tū’ino-hia.
deselect-all: E fa’a’ore i te mā’itira’a ato’a
disableHardwareAcceleration: E fa’aea i te fa’ahorora’a pūai a te mātini
disableHardwareAcceleration-explain: E fa’aea teie rāve’a i te fa’ahorora’a pūai a te mātini i roto i te M³. ’Ia tauihia teie fa’anahora’a, e tītauhia ’ia tōmura-fa’ahou-hia te fa’anahora’a ’ia mana te reira. E nehenehe te reira e fa’atītī’a’aro i te mau ha’ape’ape’ara’a hōho’a ’aore rā te tāpū-noa-ra’a i ni’a i te tahi mau pūnaho, ’aita rā e fa’atonehia nō te tahi atu mau tupura’a.
disableMediaFetching: E fa’aea i te mau rave’a nō te mau tūru’ira’a mātauhia ’e te tōtautā-noa-ra’a media
disableMediaFetching-explain: E mea maita’i ’ia vai fa’aea-noa-hia teie fa’anahora’a i roto i te rahira’a o te mau tupura’a ’ia tōtautā-noa-hia mai te mau media nō te mau tūru’ira’a mātauhia. ’Ia fa’atāuhia teie fa’anahora’a, e tītauhia ’ia fa’a’ō-rima-hia te mau media ato’a. E mea maita’i ’ia fa’atāuhia teie fa’anahora’a i ni’a noa i te mau hoho’a tātara’a i fa’ata’ahia nō te mau tūru’ira’a ta’a ’ē, mai te mau ha’api’ira’a fa’arō, te mau tūru’ira’a rahi, ’aore rā te mau tairurura’a.
disk-space-is-running-low: Te ’ano’ano ra te vāhi vaira’a parau o tō ’oe rorouira. E fa’anoa mai paho’i e 10 GB hi’o ’āfata vāhi vaira’a parau ’ia nehenehe te M³ e fa’ahoro maita’ihia.
does-your-kingdom-hall-use-a-program-cal: Te fa’a’ohipa ra ānei tō ’outou Piha nō te Basileia i te hō’ē fa’anahora’a parauhia @:obsStudio?
doing-so-will-greatly-simplify-and-facil: ’Ia nā-reira-hia, e māmā-roa-hia ’e e fā’ofie-roa-hia te tuha’ra’a media i roto i te mau tūru’ira’a ’āpiti.
dont-forget-add-missing-media: ’Apa’i, ’eiaha e mo’ehia ’ia fa’a’ō mai i te mau hīmene ’aore rā te mau media i toe.
dont-forget-to-add-circuit-overseer-date: Nō te rorou maita’i a’e, e fa’a’ō i te mahana fā’ra’a a te ti’a’au ha’a’ati i roto i te tuha’a "@:congregationMeetings" o te mau Fa’anahora’a.
drag-and-drop-or-click-to-browse: E pāte’e ’e e tu’u i te mau pu’era’a parau i’onei ’aore rā e tāmā’iti nō te ’imi.
drop-media-here: E tu’u i’onei nō te fa’a’ō i roto i teie tuha’a
edit-sections: E fa’atītī’aifaro i te mau tuha’a
edit-sections-explain: E fa’a’ō, e fa’anaho-fa’ahou ’aore rā e taui i te mau tuha’a media ta’a ’ē
enableAutomaticMeetingScheduleUpdates: Fa’ahoupa’a ’āfaro i te porotarama mai te tahua mana
enableAutomaticMeetingScheduleUpdates-ex: ’Ia fa’ati’ahia, e hi’opoa tōmora te M³ i te tahua natirara mana a te Ite o Iehova nō te hi’o ē ua taui ānei te mau hora tūru’ira’a nō teie nei ’e nō a muri atu a tō ’outou amuira’a, ’e e fa’ahoupa’a ’āfaro te reira i roto i te porotarama. E tupu noa te reira ’ia fa’a’ōhia te parau nō te amuira’a nā roto i te mātini ’imi ’e ’ia ’ore te i’oa o te amuira’a i tauihia.
enableCacheAutoClear: E fa’ati’a i te tāmāra’a ’āfaro o te cache
enableCacheAutoClear-explain: ’Ia fa’ati’ahia, e tāmā ’āfaro tōmora te porotarama i te mau pu’era’a parau cache tei ’ore i fa’a’ohipahia. E tauturu te reira ’ia vata mai te vāhi vaira’a parau ’e ’ia vai maita’i noa te fāito o te cache.
enableCustomEvents: E fa’ati’a i te ’āmura’a o te mau rurura’a ta’a ’ē
enableCustomEvents-explain: E fa’anaho i te mau rāve’a ha’apoto i’ei’a nō te fa’atupu i te tahi mau ’ohipa ta’a ’ē, mai te fa’atā’ira’a, te fa’ahope’ara’a ’aore rā te fa’atautora’a i te ho’e media, ’aore rā te fa’atā’ira’a i te hīmene hope’a i te taime tūru’ira’a. E mea faufa’a te reira nō te feia ite rahi e hina’aro nei e ’āmui atu i roto i te tahi atu mau porotarama, mai te AutoHotkey ’aore rā te AutoIt.
enableExtraCache: E tōtautā i te mau tōta’a tōna’a hīmene i roto i te cache
enableExtraCache-explain: E tōtautā i te mau tōna’a hīmene ato’a i roto i te cache nō te ha’amaita’i i te tere o te porotarama. A ha’amauruhi ē e mara’a te fāito o te cache media.
enableFolderWatcher: E hi’opoa i te pu’era’a parau nō te ’imi i te tahi atu media
enableFolderWatcher-explain: E hi’opoa teie rāve’a i te ho’e pu’era’a parau tā ’outou i mā’iti nō te ’imi i te mau parau ’āpī, ’e e fa’a’ō ’āfaro te reira i roto i te tāpa’ura’a media.
enableKeyboardShortcuts: ’A fa’atupu i te mau pā’atā papāmāha
enableKeyboardShortcuts-explain: ’A fa’a’ohipa i te mau pā’atā papāmāha nō te fa’atere-vave-ra’a i te mau rorouira mātā’ia.
enableMediaAutoExport-explain: E hā’ono-noa-hia te mau rorouira mātā’ia i roto i te vaira’a parau i mā’itihia, ma te fa’anahora’a ta’a ’ē nō te mahana tā’itahi.
enableMediaDisplayButton-explain: E fa’ari’i i te mau hōho’a ’e te mau tāta’ira’a i roto i te hō’ē ha’amāramaramara’a ’aore rā i ni’a i te hō’ē paruai i rāpae. ’Ia fa’a’ohipahia i te Piha nō te Basileia, e tītauhia i te rahira’a o te taime ’ia fa’atupuhia teie fa’anahora’a.
enableMediaWindowFadeTransitions: ’A fa’atupu i te tauira’a-māru ’ia huna-hia ’aore rā ’ia fa’ari’i-hia te ha’amāramaramara’a media
enableMediaWindowFadeTransitions-explain: ’Ia fa’atupuhia teie fa’anahora’a, e fā mai ’e e mou māru noa mai te ha’amāramaramara’a media, e ’ere rā mā te ’ānimanina-vave-ra’a. E hōro’a mai te reira i te hō’ē hi’ora’a nehenehe roa atu ā.
enableMusicButton: ’A fa’atupu i te fa’ata’ira’a hīmene tua
enableMusicButton-explain: ’A fa’atā’i i te mau hīmene na mua atu ’e i muri a’e i te mau putuputura’a mā te tahi noa mau nī’ira’a.
enablePinyinSongs: Mā’iti na mua i te mau hīmene pinyin
enablePinyinSongs-explain: ’Ia ’itehia te hō’ē hīmene putuputura’a ’āparau-hia nā roto i te pāpa’ira’a pinyin i roto i te vaira’a parau hīmene pinyin, e fa’a’ohipahia te reira nō te mono i te hīmene mātauhia.
enablePlaybackSpeedControl: ’A fa’atupu i te fa’aterera’a i te vitiviti o te fa’ata’ira’a

obs-studio-disconnected-banner: ’Aita e tū’ati te M³ ’e te OBS Studio. A hi’opo’a ē tē ’ohipa nei te @:obsStudio ’e ’ua tātā’ihia te reira.
obs-studio-is-a-free-app-used-to-manage-: E fa’anahora’a tūtohu noa te @:obsStudio nō te fa’atere i te video ’e te ’āfata tātā’i i roto i te mau Piha a te Basileia e rave rahi.
obsCameraScene-explain: The scene in @:obsStudio that will be used as the default stage view. As per latest direction, this should be a wide shot.
obsEnable-explain: Connect M³ to @:obsStudio to enable automated switching between media and camera scenes.
obsHideIcons: Do not display icons in the scene switcher
obsHideIcons-explain: When enabled, icons will be hidden in the scene switcher. This may increase the legibility of scene names.
obsImageScene-explain: A scene can be configured in @:obsStudio specifically to display images, for example in a picture-in-picture style. If this is left blank, the default media scene will be used instead.
obsMediaScene-explain: The scene in @:obsStudio that will be used to broadcast media to Zoom participants.
obsPassword-explain: Find the configured password under Tools > WebSocket Server Settings in OBS Studio.
obsPort-explain: Find the configured port under Tools > WebSocket Server Settings in OBS Studio.
obsPostponeImages-explain: When enabled, images will only be displayed for Zoom participants when the media operator clicks on the "Show in @:obsStudio" button. This can be useful if you generally display images to the in-person audience before sharing them on Zoom.
obsQuickToggle-explain: When enabled, hovering over the @:obsStudio button will open the scene switcher. This can be useful for quickly switching scenes in @:obsStudio, especially if many scenes are configured.
obsRememberPreviouslyUsedScene: Remember previously used scene after media playback
obsRememberPreviouslyUsedScene-explain: When enabled, M³ will remember the scene that was active before media started playing and will return to it when media playback ends. Otherwise, M³ will switch to the default camera scene.
obsSwitchSceneAfterMedia: Delay scene changes when playing media
obsSwitchSceneAfterMedia-explain: When enabled, @:obsStudio will defer scene changes until after any currently playing media has finished. Note: enabling this option will also remove media and image scenes from the scene switcher.
once-the-scene-has-been-created-select-i: Once the scene has been created, select it here.
only-show-settings-that-are-not-valid: Only show settings that are not valid
path-probe-network-warning-caption: Please ensure that all configured paths are valid and can be written to. If they are network paths, please ensure that the network-related companion app is running or that the path is otherwise accessible.
path-probe-network-warning-message: There was an error writing to one of the configured paths.
pause-to-adjust-time: To enable scrubbing, the video must be paused

profile-deletion: Te ha’amoura’a i te parau fā’ite
profile-type-choose-regular: E mea maita’i a’e nō te rahira’a o te feia fa’ahoro ’ia mā’iti i te rāve’a "Mātauhia".
profile-type-regular: I te rahira’a o te taime, te mā’itira’a i te rāve’a "Mātauhia" te rāve’a maita’i a’e. Na roto i te reira, e hāhamania te hō’ē parau fā’ite tei tōtarataramea noa i te mau tūrama nō te mau putuputura’a ato’a, ’e e fa’atere ato’a te reira i te mau tūranga nō te fa’ahorora’a tūrama tei mātauhia i te fa’a’ohipahia i te mau putuputura’a a te amuira’a.
profile-type-special: A mā’iti i te rāve’a "Te tahi atu" ’ia hāhamania te hō’ē parau fā’ite e ’ere tōna parau ’ia tōtarataramea noa i te mau tūrama. E ti’a ’ia tōtarameahia te mau tūrama ma te rima nō te fa’a’ohipa i roto i teie parau fā’ite. E fa’a’ohipahia teie huru parau fā’ite nō te mau ha’api’ira’a teotaratia, te mau tairurura’a, ’e te tahi atu mau tupura’a ta’a ’ē.
publication-media-explain: E fā’arii i te mau tūrama nō roto mai i te mau ve’a, te mau puka ra’ara’a, te mau puka, ’e te tahi atu mau puka parau
receive-beta-updates: E fā’arii i te mau porotarama tōmua (beta) hou te taime
receive-beta-updates-explain: Te vai ra paha te tahi mau rāve’a ’ohipa pāpū ’ore ’e te mau paruparu (bugs) i roto i teie mau rāve’a ’āpī beta. ’Aha’iri e fa’atere i teie rāve’a i ni’a i te mātini rorouira e fa’a’ohipahia nei nō te mau putuputura’a.
recordingEnable: E tuiati ia M³ nō te fa’atere ’āmui ’e te hō’ē porotarama haruharu’a rāfa’e
recordingEnable-explain: No te mea ’aore e rāve’a haruharu’a i roto ia M³, ’ia fa’aterehia teie rāve’a e nehenehe ai ’oia e fa’atere i te hō’ē porotarama haruharu’a rāfa’e ma te fa’a’ohipa i te mau rāve’a ha’apotora’a patapata (shortcuts) nō te ha’amata ’e nō te ha’amuti i te haruharu’a. Ta’a ’ē noa atu: e ’ere teie rāve’a i te mea tuiati ’e te OBS Studio. Mai te pēpē e fa’a’ohipa nei ’oe i te OBS Studio, ’a fa’a’ohipa i te rāve’a haruharu’a a te OBS Studio i roto i te tu’atira’a OBS Studio.
recordingFolder-explain: ’A fa’ata’a i te putu puka i reira te porotarama rāfa’e e ha’aputu ai i te mau haruharu’a. E ’ere i te mea tītau-roa-hia, ’ia hōro’ahia mai rā, e fa’a’ite mai M³ i te hō’ē pitopito nō te tōfeti i teie putu puka.
recordingStartShortcut: Rāve’a ha’apotora’a nō te ha’amata i te haruharu’a
recordingStartShortcut-explain: ’A patapata i te rāve’a ha’apotora’a nō te ha’amata i te haruharu’a i roto i te porotarama rāfa’e. E hā’pono M³ i teie rāve’a ha’apotora’a ’ia tōfeti ’oe i te @:start-recording i roto i te ha’ama’aramaramara’a nō te mau haruharu’a putuputura’a.
recordingStopShortcut: Rāve’a ha’apotora’a nō te ha’amuti i te haruharu’a
recordingStopShortcut-explain: ’A patapata i te rāve’a ha’apotora’a nō te ha’amuti i te haruharu’a i roto i te porotarama rāfa’e. E hā’pono M³ i teie rāve’a ha’apotora’a ’ia tōfeti ’oe i te @:stop-recording i roto i te ha’ama’aramaramara’a nō te mau haruharu’a putuputura’a. ’Ia vaiiho-noa-hia te reira ma te pāpāmuti, e fa’a’ohipa-fa’ahou-hia e M³ i te rāve’a ha’apotora’a @:start-recording.
refresh-all-meeting-media-confirm: E fa’ahepo teie ’ohipa i te hō’ē fa’ahoura’a nō te mau putuputura’a ato’a ’e e tōtaramea mai i te mau huru ’āpī nō te mau tūrama i fa’a’āpīhia. ’A ha’amauruuru i te tahi mana’ora’a: e ’ere teie ’ohipa i te mea tū’ati i ni’a i te mau tūrama i tōtarameahia ma te rima. Te pāpū ra ānei ’oe nō te fa’atere i teie ’ohipa?
relinkCongregationButton: Fa’atere i te tū’atira’a tōpata taime
relinkCongregationButton-explain: Fa’atere i te tū’atira’a tōpata nō te mahana ’e te taime putuputura’a mai ni’a mai i te tahua reva tōmiti a te Ite nō Iehova.
remind-me-later: A fa’aha’amana’o iā’u a muri atu
remove-all-cache: ’A tatara i te mau putu parau ato’a mai roto mai i te vāhi ha’aputura’a tōpata
remove-unused-cache: ’A tatara i te mau mea ato’a tei ’ere i te fa’a’ohipahia mai roto mai i te vāhi ha’aputura’a tōpata
rename: ’A taui i te i’oa o te tūrama
rename-explain: E ’ere te tauira’a i’oa o teie mau tūrama i te mea tūtari nō te vāhi ta’ato’a; e fa’aho’ihia mai te i’oa mātāmua ’ia tōfeti-fa’ahou-hia te application.
repeat: E tōtahi-noa teie tūrama ma te tū’ati
repeat-media-item-explain: ’A mā’iti i teie rāve’a ’ia hina’aro-hia teie tūrama ’ia ha’atōtahi-noa-hia e tae roa atu ’ia ha’amuti-noa-hia ma te rima.
repeat-section-explain: E faatere tamau i te mau roromi-parau atoʻa o teie tuhaʻa.
reSyncMeetingScheduleButton-explain: Use this to manually synchronize your meeting days and times with the information provided on the official website of Jehovah's Witnesses.
scene-not-found: A problem occurred while activating a scene in OBS Studio.
scene-not-found-explain: Please check the configured scenes in the Settings.
screen-access-required: Screen recording permissions are required for this feature
screen-access-required-explain: Please restart the app when screen recording permissions have been granted in System Settings.
select-a-custom-background: Choose an image that will be displayed as the background image instead of the yeartext. This would normally be used only on special occasions, such as the Memorial.
select-a-date-to-begin: Please select a date to begin.
select-media-items-explain: Select which media items to import from this document.
select-s34mp-media: Click on a public talk title to add its media. To refresh the current file with a newer version of the S-34 or S-34mp, click Replace.
select-s34mp-to-add-pt-media: Download the combined S-34 JWPUB file containing all public talk outlines from the official website of Jehovah's Witnesses. If that file is not available in your language or branch territory, you can download the S-34mp media playlist JWPUB file instead. Once downloaded, selecting the file here will allow you to access all available media for public talks. The selected JWPUB file will be cached, but can be updated or replaced at any time if a newer version becomes available.
set-custom-durations: Set custom start and end times
setupWizard.intro: M³ makes playing media at congregation meetings easy and stress-free. Let's configure a few things, and then you'll be ready to go.
shortcutMediaNext-explain: Shortcut to select the next video or picture in the list.
shortcutMediaPauseResume-explain: Shortcut to play or pause the currently selected media. If the media is an image, pausing will have the same effect as stopping.
shortcutMediaPrevious-explain: Shortcut to select the previous video or picture in the list.
shortcutMediaStop-explain: Shortcut to stop playing the currently selected media.
shortcutMediaWindow-explain: Shortcut to quickly hide or show the media window.
shortcutMusic-explain: Shortcut to start or stop the background music.
show-hidden-media-explain: This will show any media that was previously hidden for the currently selected day.
sign-language-bible-media: Add media from the Bible in sign language
some-media-items-are-hidden: Some media items have been hidden.
some-media-items-are-missing-explain: Some media could not be downloaded automatically. You can add this media manually if needed by using the @:extra-media menu or by dragging it into the media list from your computer.
some-songs-are-duplicated: Some songs appear more than once in the media list. Please check if this is intentional.
stop-playing-media-first: Please stop media playback before navigating to a different page.
stop-playing-media-first-explain: You can't change pages while media is playing.
stop-repeat-media-item: Do not loop this media item
stop-repeat-media-item-explain: Choose this if the selected media item should play until the end and then stop.
study-bible-media: Images, videos, charts and maps from the Study Bible
successfully-migrated-from-the-previous-: Successfully migrated from the previous version
suppressHardwareAccelerationReminder-exp: Disables the reminder to re-enable hardware acceleration if it was manually disabled.
sureStopVideo: Are you sure you want to stop the video?
the-name-of-your-congregation-or-group-w: The profile name will help you to quickly switch between profiles, if you ever decide to create more than one in the future.
there-are-no-media-items-for-the-selecte: There are no media items for the selected date.
this-is-a-test-version: This is a test version! Use it for testing purposes but don't keep it installed.
this-meeting-is-far-in-the-future: This meeting is in the future...
this-song-is-duplicated: This song appears more than once in the media list.
this-will-only-delete-media-for-this-day: This action will only remove items that were added manually for the selected day
this-will-speed-up-media-retrieval-for-m: This will speed up media retrieval for meeting media, but is not mandatory.
thisShouldBeInvestigatedToEnsureThatAllR: This should be investigated to ensure that all required meeting media is present
timerAutoOpen-explain: Automatically open the timer window on application launch or when changing congregations.
timerBackgroundColor-explain: The background color of the timer window.
timerEnableMeetingAheadBehind-explain: When enabled, the timer will display whether the meeting is ahead or behind schedule.
timerEnableMeetingCountdown-explain: Show a countdown timer until the start of scheduled meetings.
timerMeetingCountdownMinutes-explain: Configure the number of minutes for which the countdown timer should be shown on the timer display before the start of scheduled meetings. Note that the countdown is never displayed on the main media display.
timerMode-explain: Choose whether the timer should count up or count down by default.
timerOvertimeAnimation-explain: Make the timer gently blink when the participant is overtime.
timerOvertimeBackgroundColor-explain: The background color of the timer window when the participant is overtime.
timerOvertimeIndicator-explain: When enabled, the timer will visually indicate if the participant has gone overtime.
timerOvertimeShowAmountOnly: Show only elapsed overtime amount in count-up mode
timerOvertimeShowAmountOnly-explain: If using count-up mode, and if the planned duration is exceeded, the timer will display the amount of time by which the participant is over (e.g. -00:30) instead of the total elapsed part time.
timerOvertimeTextColor-explain: The text color of the timer when the participant is overtime.
timerShowOnActionIsland: Show timer value on action island
timerShowOnActionIsland-explain: Show the current timer value on the action island timer button.
timerTextColor-explain: The color of the timer text.
timerTextSize-explain: The size of the timer text.
to-quickly-show-and-hide-zoom-participan: Tip: To ensure you're able to quickly show and hide Zoom participants on the TV screens when needed, make sure that the setting to "use dual monitors" in Zoom is enabled.
update-available-please-update: A new version of M³ is available! We recommend updating to receive the latest features, bug fixes, and security updates.
update-downloaded: A new version of M³ has been downloaded and is ready to be installed.
update-downloading: A new version of M³ is available and downloading in the background.
update-error-read-only-volume: M³ could not be updated because it is stored in a directory that is read-only. Please move M³ to a different location, such as the Applications folder.
updates-disabled-warning: Please enable updates to receive new features, bug fixes, and important security updates.
use-the-import-button-to-add-media-for-t: Use the @:extra-media button to add media for this date, or select a different date to view the corresponding media for that day.
use-the-slider-below-to-adjust-the-start: Use the slider below to adjust the start and end time of this media item. This is useful for playing only certain parts of a video.
watch-folder-error-caption: Please ensure that all necessary companion apps, such as Dropbox, are running, and that the path provided is valid and can be written.
watch-folder-error-message: An error occurred with the watch folder.
watched-media-item-explain: This media item was added from a monitored folder
weDay-explain: Choose the day on which the weekend meeting takes place.
well-start-fetching-media-while-we-wrap-: We'll start fetching media while we wrap up with our initial setup.
weStartTime-explain: Choose the time at which the weekend meeting starts.
what-are-your-meeting-days-and-times-wel: What are your meeting days and times? We'll use this information to display the media calendar.
what-kind-of-profile-is-this: Choose the type of profile you would like to create.
what-language-would-you-like-m-to-be-dis: What language would you like M³ to be displayed in?
when-you-are-done-presenting-the-website: When you no longer need to present the website, either close the website window, or click on the "Stop Mirroring" button in the top right corner of this window.
when-you-click-the-button-on-the-top-rig: When you click the "Open Website" button on the top right corner of this window, a new window will open to the official website of Jehovah's Witnesses.
willProbablyBeAvailableLater: However, the missing media is likely to become available closer to the meeting date
would-you-like-to-enable-songbook-video-: Would you like to cache all songbook videos?
would-you-like-to-integrate-m-with-obs-s: Would you like to integrate M³ with @:obsStudio?
would-you-like-to-integrate-zoom: Would you like to integrate M³ with Zoom?
yeartext-cleared: The yeartext for {currentYear} has now been restored.
yeartext-preview-failed: Failed to fetch the yeartext for {year}. Please try again later.
yeartext-preview-next-year: Would you like to preview the yeartext for {year}?
yeartext-preview-success: The yeartext for {year} will now be shown for 10 seconds.
you-can-navigate-the-website-before-pres: If necessary, you can navigate to a specific page before presenting it to the audience. When you're ready, press the "Start Mirroring" button on the top right corner of this window. What you see in the website window will now be displayed in the media window for the audience to see.
zoom-integration-explain: Enable this to let M³ automatically start and stop Zoom screen sharing when media starts and stops playing.
zoomAutoFocusMediaWindow: Automatically focus media window after Zoom screen sharing starts
zoomAutoFocusMediaWindow-explain: This is usually not required, but could be helpful on some systems if the media window regularly loses focus after Zoom screen sharing starts.
zoomEnable-explain: This will not automate Zoom fully. Rather, it will attempt to start and stop Zoom screen sharing using the keyboard shortcut configured in Zoom's "Start/stop screen sharing" setting whenever media starts and stops playing in M³.
zoomScreenShareShortcut-explain: Enter the keyboard shortcut configured in Zoom's "Start/stop screen sharing" setting. M³ will send this shortcut when media starts playing (to start screen sharing) and when it stops (to stop screen sharing). In order to use this feature, you need to enable the "Global shortcut" setting for that particular shortcut in Zoom's settings.
